_comment: OFFLINE demo fixture using the real staging entity keys (F-066). Entity keys match ../javascript-sdk/demo/nodejs/routes/events.js and ../php-sdk/demo/laravel/config/convert.php. Account/project IDs are the shared public staging project (10035569/10034190). Experience, feature, segment, and goal IDs below are placeholder values used ONLY for deterministic offline evaluation — the LIVE run fetches the real IDs from the staging config endpoint. TOPOLOGY: test-feature-rollout-1 is modelled as a FEATURE (fullStackFeature), resolved via run_feature('test-feature-rollout-1'). The feature is linked to experience test-experience-ab-fullstack-1 via variation changes[].data.feature_id. Source: ../javascript-sdk/demo/nodejs/routes/events.js (featureRolloutKey) — JS is authoritative per the spec. The LIVE staging override is handled via the CONVERT_DEMO_FEATURE_ROLLOUT_KEY env var for LIVE mode if the live config carries a different key. Both the experience and the feature are UNGATED (no audience/location rules) so OFFLINE buckets deterministically regardless of the attributes/location passed by the demo.
